objective: Plan a bilaterally admitted AIIP channel, signed and sequenced envelope family, exact profile negotiation, and mandatory root and receipt manifest between distinct Systems.
falsifiable_claim: Only distinct independently governed System endpoints with bilaterally admitted versions, profiles, schemas, roots, and receipts can exchange accepted AIIP packets.
exit_criteria: Two distinct independently governed System endpoints enroll exact profiles and preserve local operation after disconnect.
Equal identities and missing endpoint decisions plus version, root, signature, sequence, nonce, and idempotency substitutions fail.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M12_AIIP_CHANNEL_ENVELOPE_PROFILE_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute equal identity, endpoint decision, profile, version, schema, root, receipt, signature, sequence, nonce, idempotency key, retry state, and disconnect recovery.
remaining_nonclaims: Transport, socket, or node identity does not establish sovereignty.
No discovery, terms, useful-value, two-sovereign proof, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
